description: This Java class, NotificationConfig, configures notification services in a Spring Boot application. It defines beans for email and SMS providers (currently stub implementations) and a notification service, utilizing Spring annotations for dependency injection and property configuration.

classes.name: NotificationConfig
classes.description: Spring configuration class that defines beans for notification services, including stub implementations for email and SMS providers and the notification service itself.

methods.name: emailProvider
methods.description: Provides a stub email provider bean, with hooks for future real provider integration.

methods.name: smsProvider
methods.description: Provides a stub SMS provider bean, with hooks for future real provider integration.

methods.name: notificationService
methods.description: Creates and supplies the NotificationService bean using provided properties and notification providers.
